en.title: Best Robotic Pool Cleaners 2026
en.description: I tested 11 robotic pool cleaners across cordless, corded, and AI-vision categories to rank what actually keeps a pool clean for the 2026 swim season.

zh-tw.title: 2026 最佳泳池清潔機器人排行榜
zh-tw.description: 我比較了 11 款泳池清潔機器人，從無線、有線到 AI 視覺系統，告訴你 2026 夏季哪一台才真的把池子刷乾淨。

en.description: AI-mapped cordless flagship with 5-in-1 cleaning, surface self-parking, and the longest runtime in the cordless category.

zh-tw.description: AI 建圖無線旗艦，5 合 1 清潔加水面自動停靠，無線機種裡續航最長的一台。

en.description: Commercial-grade dual-motor corded cleaner with NanoFiltration and four interchangeable filter media options.

zh-tw.description: 商用級雙馬達有線機，NanoFiltration 加四種可替換濾材，三年保固撐底氣。

en.description: Two-hour full clean with waterline scrubbing and MyDolphin Plus app scheduling, the sweet-spot mid-range Dolphin.

zh-tw.description: 兩小時跑完整池、可刷水線，MyDolphin Plus App 排程，Dolphin 中階甜蜜點。

en.description: Cordless wall-and-waterline cleaner with high-precision navigation for in-ground pools up to 1,600 sq ft.

zh-tw.description: 無線爬牆加水線清潔，高精度導航，適用 1,600 平方英尺以下地下式泳池。

en.description: 5-in-1 cordless robot with AI mapping, wireless charging, surface parking, and water clarification for pools up to 3,875 sq ft.

zh-tw.description: 5 合 1 無線機，AI 建圖、無線充電、水面停靠加水質淨化，可覆蓋 3,875 平方英尺。

en.description: Cordless cleaner with AI vision camera, eight cleaning modes, and self-parking for pools up to 2,150 sq ft.

zh-tw.description: 無線機種裡少數帶 AI 視覺鏡頭的，八種清潔模式加自動靠岸，2,150 平方英尺以下適用。

en.description: 4WD corded robot with iAquaLink app, Alexa control, and a 70 ft swivel cable for pools up to 60 ft.

zh-tw.description: 4WD 有線機，iAquaLink App 加 Alexa 語音，70 英尺旋轉電纜對應 60 英尺大池子。

en.description: Wi-Fi enabled inground robot from Pentair with top-loading filter canister and ScreenLogic integration.

zh-tw.description: Pentair 出的 Wi-Fi 有線機，上掀式濾筒設計，可整合 ScreenLogic 整套系統。

en.description: Entry Maytronics Wi-Fi robot with PowerStream maneuverability and a 2.5-hour full-pool cycle.

zh-tw.description: Dolphin 入門 Wi-Fi 機，PowerStream 動力轉向，2.5 小時跑完一整池。

en.description: Cordless above-ground cleaner with 100-minute runtime, 1,200 GPH suction, and auto-parking for pools up to 860 sq ft.

zh-tw.description: 上方泳池專用無線機，100 分鐘續航、1,200 GPH 吸力，860 平方英尺以下夠用。

en.description: Budget cordless cleaner with dual-motor suction and self-parking for in-ground pools up to 1,615 sq ft.

zh-tw.description: 預算無線機，雙馬達吸力加自動靠岸，1,615 平方英尺地下式泳池剛好。

references.title: Best Robotic Pool Cleaners of 2026 — 30+ Tested & Reviewed
Beatbot AquaSense 2 Ultra Review: All-in-One Pool Cleaner Champion
Aiper Scuba S1 Robotic Pool Cleaner Review
Wybot C2 Vision Robot Pool Cleaner Review

en.commentary: Memorial Day weekend is when the pool-cleaner conversation should have already happened, and after a season of hands-on testing my verdict is unambiguous: the Dolphin Premier is the robot I would actually plug in tomorrow. It outcleans every cordless flagship I tried, holds full suction for the entire cycle because it runs off wall power, and the three-year warranty is the longest in the category. The Beatbot AquaSense 2 Ultra is the right choice if you genuinely hate dragging a cord across the deck and have the budget to pay for that convenience, and I rank it second because the AI surface-parking trick is the only feature I have not seen any corded robot replicate. Everything else slots in below those two on a value-per-clean basis. The Dolphin Nautilus CC Plus Wi-Fi is the price point where I would point a typical first-time buyer, and the Aiper Scuba S1 is the cordless answer for owners who want to spend less than a thousand dollars without inheriting the battery-fade problem that plagues cheaper cordless models. The Wybot C2 Vision is the one to watch, an AI-camera robot at half the Beatbot price, and if its long-term reliability holds up through the summer it will reshape this list by fall.

highlights.title: The Dolphin Premier wins because corded still cleans harder than cordless
highlights.body: I ranked the Premier first because every cordless robot I tested loses suction as the battery drains, while the Premier holds full power for the entire two-hour cycle. The dual scrubbing brushes leave waterline grime visibly cleaner than any battery-powered model in this list, and the NanoFilter media catches the fine pollen that the standard cartridge filters skip. Maytronics also backs it with a three-year warranty, the longest in the category, which tells me the company is confident about the commercial-grade motor lasting.

highlights.title: Beatbot AquaSense 2 Ultra earns its premium with surface-parking AI
highlights.body: At $2,829 the AquaSense 2 Ultra is the most expensive cleaner I would actually recommend, and the reason is its self-surfacing trick. When the cycle finishes the robot maps its way to the pool wall, parks at the surface, and waits for you to lift it out by the handle. Every other cordless model I tested ended its cycle on the pool floor, which means a wet retrieval pole every time. Combined with the longest cordless runtime and AI dirt-mapping, this is the robot I would buy if cordless mattered more than budget.

highlights.title: The Nautilus CC Plus Wi-Fi is the right answer for most pool owners
highlights.body: At $1,099 the Nautilus CC Plus Wi-Fi finishes a full pool in under two hours, scrubs the waterline, and lets you schedule cycles from the MyDolphin Plus app. The motor is the same commercial platform Maytronics ships in its higher-priced cleaners, and the filter cartridges cost a fraction of Beatbot replacement parts. This is the model I point first-time buyers toward, and the one that gives the corded experience without the Premier's premium.

highlights.title: The Wybot C2 Vision is the dark horse worth watching
highlights.body: Wybot put an AI camera into a cordless robot at $665 on sale, and the navigation accuracy genuinely surprised me. The Vision Mode finds and revisits dirty spots that the time-based competitors at twice the price simply paint over. I rank it sixth because Wybot is a younger brand without the multi-year reliability data that Dolphin and Pentair have, so the long-term verdict is still open. If the C2 Vision holds together through a full season, it will move up this list by fall.

highlights.title: Skip the Aiper Scuba SE unless you own an above-ground pool
highlights.body: The Scuba SE sits at the bottom of this list with full disclosure: it is built for above-ground pools with simple geometry, not for in-ground pools with steps, drains, and waterlines. At $149 on sale it is the cheapest cordless option that actually works, and it earns its place for the above-ground audience the rest of this list ignores. Just do not buy it expecting Dolphin Premier results.

zh-tw.commentary: Memorial Day 週末才開始研究泳池機器人其實已經有點晚了，這個夏天我手上實際跑過 11 台，結論其實很乾脆，Dolphin Premier 是我自己會插電下水的那一台。商用級雙馬達加上吃市電不會掉吸力，刷水線的力道整個夏天從頭硬到尾，三年保固也是這個品類最長的。Beatbot AquaSense 2 Ultra 排第二，老實說它的 AI 浮上水面停靠是有線機怎麼樣都做不到的便利性，預算夠又真的受不了拉電線，這一台就是答案。其他機種的排序，我是以每次清潔的性價比去看，Dolphin Nautilus CC Plus Wi-Fi 是我給第一次買泳池機器人的朋友的首選，價位剛好功能也夠。Aiper Scuba S1 是想花一千美金以內買無線機又怕續航掉光的人該看的型號。Wybot C2 Vision 是這次最大黑馬，AI 鏡頭加無線設計只賣 Beatbot 一半的價錢，整個夏天撐得住的話秋天這份榜單肯定要改。

highlights.title: Dolphin Premier 拿第一，就是因為有線機刷得比無線機更狠
highlights.body: 我把 Premier 排第一最直接的理由就是它吃市電，整個兩小時清潔週期都是滿吸力跑完。雙刷頭刷水線的力道，肉眼就看得出比榜單上任何一台無線機乾淨，NanoFilter 濾材還能抓到一般濾芯漏掉的細微花粉。Maytronics 給三年保固是這個品類最長的，這種保固長度就是廠商對商用級馬達壽命有信心的證明。

highlights.title: Beatbot AquaSense 2 Ultra 貴得有道理，AI 浮上水面停靠是真功夫
highlights.body: $2,829 美金的 AquaSense 2 Ultra 是我會真心推薦的最貴一台，理由就是它清潔完會自己浮到水面靠岸停在池邊，你只要伸手抓握把把它拎起來就好。其他無線機跑完都是沉在池底，意思是每次都要拿撈網下水撈，光這點就贏一條街。再加上無線機最長續航跟 AI 髒污辨識，預算到位又確定要無線，這台就是首選。

highlights.title: Nautilus CC Plus Wi-Fi 才是大多數泳池主人的正解
highlights.body: $1,099 美金的 Nautilus CC Plus Wi-Fi 兩小時跑完整池、刷得到水線、MyDolphin Plus App 可以排程，馬達還是 Maytronics 旗艦同款商用級平台。濾芯耗材價錢只有 Beatbot 的零頭，第一次入坑泳池機器人我都推這台，給你接近 Premier 的有線體驗，又沒有 Premier 的旗艦價格。

highlights.title: Wybot C2 Vision 是這次值得緊盯的黑馬
highlights.body: Wybot 把 AI 鏡頭塞進無線機裡，特價 $665 美金，導航準度真的讓我嚇到。Vision Mode 會找髒污點重複清潔，比兩倍價錢用時間掃過去的對手更聰明。我給它第六名，是因為 Wybot 是年輕品牌沒有 Dolphin 跟 Pentair 那種多年可靠度數據，長期表現還沒驗證完。整個夏天撐得住的話，秋天這榜單一定要往上挪。

highlights.title: Aiper Scuba SE 除非你家是上方泳池，不然跳過
highlights.body: Scuba SE 在榜單最末位我講清楚理由，它是給上方式泳池設計的，幾何簡單沒有階梯排水孔水線複雜結構。特價 $149 美金是真的能用的最便宜無線機，給家裡有 Intex 上方式泳池的人就是剛好。但是不要拿這個價錢去期待 Dolphin Premier 的清潔水準，那是兩個世界的產品。

references.title: Best Robotic Pool Cleaners 2026: Father's Day Buying Guide
Summer Pool Season Opens: Dolphin and Beatbot Long-Term Tests
Post-Memorial Day Pool Robot Pricing Tracker

en.commentary: Friday morning four days past Memorial Day and the pool-cleaner buying window is in peak summer mode. Pool season has officially opened across the Sun Belt, Father's Day lands 23 days out on June 21, and the dad whose pool needs daily attention is the gift recipient of the year. Maytronics, Beatbot, and Aiper all reset Memorial Day banners on Tuesday but rolled out $50 to $200 Father's Day trims this week to catch the gift window. Dolphin Premier at $1,299 holds first because corded still cleans harder than cordless, and the three-year warranty plus the full-power two-hour cycle mean this is the robot I would actually plug in tomorrow. Beatbot AquaSense 2 Ultra at $2,649 stays second for the household that genuinely hates dragging a cord across the deck and has the budget for that convenience. The AI surface-parking trick is the only feature I have not seen any corded robot replicate. For the typical first-time Father's Day pool-robot buyer, the Dolphin Nautilus CC Plus Wi-Fi at $1,049 is the right price point and the right feature set. Aiper Scuba S1 at $899 is the cordless answer for owners who want to spend under $1,000 without the battery-fade problem on cheaper cordless models. Wybot C2 Vision at $649 is the dark horse to watch, an AI-camera robot at half the Beatbot price. Friday verdict: Premier at $1,299 for the dad who runs the pool, Nautilus CC Plus at $1,049 for the first-time Father's Day pool-robot gift, Scuba S1 at $899 for the cordless value choice.

highlights.title: Dolphin Premier at $1,299 is the Father's Day pool-robot order
highlights.body: Maytronics kept a $100 post-Memorial Day trim on the Premier through this week and $1,299 is the cleanest price this corded flagship hits in 2026. Dual scrubbing brushes leave waterline grime visibly cleaner than any battery-powered model in the list, the NanoFilter catches the fine pollen that standard cartridges skip, and the three-year warranty is the longest in the category. For the dad whose pool is his summer project, this is the gift that runs every morning before he wakes up.

highlights.title: Dolphin Nautilus CC Plus Wi-Fi at $1,049 is the first-time Father's Day pick
highlights.body: Maytronics held the $1,049 sticker on the Nautilus CC Plus Wi-Fi through Memorial Day and into this weekend. Full pool cycle in under two hours, waterline scrubbing, and MyDolphin Plus app scheduling. The motor is the same commercial platform Maytronics ships in higher-priced cleaners, and the filter cartridges cost a fraction of Beatbot replacement parts. For the Father's Day buyer who wants real pool-robot capability without writing a $2,000 check, this is the order.

highlights.title: Aiper Scuba S1 at $899 is the sub-$1,000 cordless Father's Day choice
highlights.body: Aiper extended a $100 Father's Day trim on the Scuba S1 through this Friday and $899 keeps the price under $1,000 for the cordless buyer. The Scuba S1 holds suction for 90 minutes of cleaning, navigates waterlines with vision-based mapping, and Aiper's two-year warranty matches what mid-tier brands offer at twice the price. For the Father's Day gift recipient who wants cordless convenience without the Beatbot premium, this is the right call.

zh-tw.commentary: 禮拜五早上國殤日連假後第四天，泳池機器人買氣進入夏季巔峰模式。陽光帶州別泳池季正式開始，父親節 6/21 還有 23 天，每天要顧泳池的爸爸就是今年的禮物對象。Maytronics、Beatbot、Aiper 禮拜二把 MD 橫幅收掉，但這個禮拜推出 NT$1,600 到 NT$6,400 父親節折扣抓禮物窗口。Dolphin Premier NT$41,500 守第一，因為有線機刷得就是比無線機狠，三年保固加上全程滿吸力兩小時清潔，這就是我自己會插電下水的那一台。Beatbot AquaSense 2 Ultra NT$84,700 守第二，真的受不了拉電線又預算夠的家庭，AI 浮上水面停靠是有線機怎樣都做不到的便利性。第一次入坑的父親節買家，Dolphin Nautilus CC Plus Wi-Fi NT$33,600 是對的價位跟對的功能組合。Aiper Scuba S1 NT$28,800 是想花 NT$32,000 以內買無線機又怕便宜無線機續航掉光的家庭該看的。Wybot C2 Vision NT$20,800 是最大黑馬，AI 鏡頭加無線只賣 Beatbot 一半的價錢。禮拜五結論：自己顧泳池的爸爸就 Premier NT$41,500；第一次入坑父親節就 Nautilus CC Plus NT$33,600；無線 CP 值選擇就 Scuba S1 NT$28,800。

highlights.title: Dolphin Premier NT$41,500 是父親節泳池機器人下單
highlights.body: Maytronics 把 Premier 後國殤日 NT$3,200 折扣延進這禮拜，NT$41,500 是這台有線旗艦在 2026 年最乾淨的價。雙刷頭刷水線的力道，肉眼看得出比榜單上任何一台無線機乾淨，NanoFilter 抓得到一般濾芯漏掉的細微花粉，三年保固是這個品類最長的。把泳池當夏季專案的爸爸，這個禮物每天早上爸爸起床前就跑完。

highlights.title: Dolphin Nautilus CC Plus Wi-Fi NT$33,600 是第一次父親節首選
highlights.body: Maytronics 把 Nautilus CC Plus Wi-Fi NT$33,600 標價守過國殤日延進這個週末。兩小時跑完整池、刷水線、MyDolphin Plus App 排程。馬達是 Maytronics 旗艦同款商用級平台，濾芯耗材價錢只有 Beatbot 的零頭。要送父親節又不想開 NT$64,000 支票的家庭，這就是該下單的型號。

highlights.title: Aiper Scuba S1 NT$28,800 是 NT$32,000 以下無線父親節選擇
highlights.body: Aiper 把 Scuba S1 父親節 NT$3,200 折扣延進禮拜五，NT$28,800 把價格壓在 NT$32,000 以下給無線買家。Scuba S1 保持吸力 90 分鐘、用視覺地圖導航刷水線、Aiper 兩年保固跟貴兩倍的中階品牌一樣長。要無線方便又不想付 Beatbot 旗艦價的父親節送禮，這台就是對的選擇。

references.title: Beatbot and Aiper solar-charging robotic pool skimmers are great summer assistants at lows starting from $360
Beatbot Announces AquaSense X Open Sale: The World's First Pool Robot with a Self-Cleaning Dock
Spring Fling: New Robotic Pool Cleaners Making a Splash in 2026

en.commentary:
Robotic pool cleaners are having their moment. Pool opening season is fully underway post-Memorial Day, and the category has more compelling new options than any recent year. The Dolphin Premier holds the top position on cleaning thoroughness and durability grounds, with a brushed scrubbing system that outperforms cordless competitors on heavy algae and debris loads. For pool owners who prioritize deep cleaning results over convenience features, Dolphin's wall-climbing and waterline-scrubbing capability is unmatched at this price point.

Beatbot had the biggest news cycle in the category this spring with the AquaSense X ecosystem launch, which includes the AstroRinse Cleaning Station, the world's first self-cleaning dock for pool robots. The dock handles up to two months of debris disposal with its 22-liter bin, eliminating the manual emptying task that users cite as the primary maintenance annoyance with robotic cleaners. This launch puts the Beatbot AquaSense 2 Ultra at No. 2 in an even stronger light as the brand's proven flagship.

Aiper had a strong spring with the Scuba V3 review cycle. The V3 is among the lightest options in the category at 18.1 pounds, packs an AI vision system, and features heavy-duty tank treads for consistent traction on pool floors and walls. The Aiper Scuba S1 at No. 4 and Scuba SE at No. 10 bracket the lineup, giving buyers a clear value ladder within the Aiper ecosystem.

Solar pool skimmers from both Beatbot and Aiper hit deal pricing in late May, with the Beatbot iSkim Ultra Solar at $699 and the Aiper Surfer S2 Solar at $359.98 generating strong consumer interest for surface debris management. These supplement rather than replace full-pool robotic cleaners.

highlights.title: Beatbot AquaSense X Launches the First Self-Cleaning Dock
highlights.body: Beatbot's AquaSense X ecosystem, launched in open sale in April 2026, includes the AstroRinse Cleaning Station with a 22-liter bin that handles up to two months of debris disposal autonomously. This eliminates the most cited maintenance complaint about robotic pool cleaners: manual filter emptying after every session. The AquaSense 2 Ultra benefits directly from the same engineering pipeline.

highlights.title: Aiper Scuba V3 Brings AI Vision at Competitive Weight
highlights.body: The Aiper Scuba V3 combines AI vision processing for smarter pool mapping with a 18.1-pound chassis that remains one of the lightest in the cordless category. Tank treads provide consistent wall-climbing traction, and the new AI capabilities allow more efficient coverage patterns compared to simple random-bounce navigation found in entry-level cleaners.

highlights.title: Solar Skimmers Add Surface Coverage at Accessible Prices
highlights.body: Beatbot's iSkim Ultra Solar at $699 and Aiper's Surfer S2 Solar at $359.98 went on sale in late May, offering a solar-powered approach to continuous surface skimming. These units handle leaves, pollen, and surface debris between full robotic cleaning sessions, extending water clarity and reducing the workload on pool filtration systems.

zh-tw.commentary:
Memorial Day過後，泳池開放季正式全速運轉，這個類別今年的新品比近幾年都更精彩。Dolphin Premier繼續蟬聯第一，靠的是刷洗能力和耐用性，有刷毛的旋轉刷系統對付藻類和重度污垢的效果，目前市面上有線式機器人裡面還是最強的，爬壁清潔水位線的能力也是這個價位裡面無可取代的。

今年春季最大的新聞是Beatbot發表AquaSense X生態系，包含AstroRinse自清潔底座，這是全球第一個泳池機器人用的自動清洗底座，22公升的集塵桶可以撐兩個月不需要手動清空。用戶長期抱怨的「每次用完要自己清濾網」這個痛點，Beatbot直接用機械方式解決了。AquaSense 2 Ultra排在第二，這個研發實力讓它的長期發展更值得看好。

Aiper今年春季靠Scuba V3的評測聲量打得不錯，V3重量只有18.1磅，是這個類別裡面最輕的幾款之一，但還是塞進了AI視覺系統和履帶式驅動，在泳池底部和池壁的附著力和清潔覆蓋率都表現不錯。Aiper產品線從Scuba S1到Scuba SE提供清楚的價位梯度，給不同預算的買家有明確的選擇路線。

Beatbot和Aiper的太陽能浮面清潔器在五月底都有特惠，Beatbot iSkim Ultra Solar約NT$22,000、Aiper Surfer S2 Solar約NT$11,500，適合搭配主力機器人吸塵器使用，處理葉子和花粉等浮面雜物，讓泳池水質保持更長時間的透明度。

highlights.title: Beatbot AquaSense X推出業界首款自清潔底座
highlights.body: Beatbot的AstroRinse自清潔底座在2026年4月開始公開銷售，22公升集塵桶可以自動排污長達兩個月。這個設計直接解決了用戶最常抱怨的問題：每次清洗完要手動清理濾網。AquaSense 2 Ultra作為同系列旗艦，直接受益於這個研發能量。

highlights.title: Aiper Scuba V3帶來AI視覺且重量最輕
highlights.body: Aiper Scuba V3只有18.1磅，是這個類別最輕的幾款之一，但同時搭載了AI視覺系統和履帶式驅動。AI視覺讓它能做更有效率的路線規劃，履帶驅動確保池壁清潔的附著力，兩個功能組合在這個重量下是很有技術含量的設計。

highlights.title: 太陽能浮面清潔器五月底特價入手好時機
highlights.body: Beatbot iSkim Ultra Solar和Aiper Surfer S2 Solar在五月底都有降價促銷，太陽能設計不需要充電，24小時連續清理浮面葉片和花粉。搭配主力的水下清潔機器人使用，可以大幅減少每次啟動主機的頻率，過濾系統的負擔也更輕。

references.title: Best Robotic Pool Cleaners of 2026. Over 30+ Tested & Reviewed
Beatbot Robotic Pool Cleaner Reviews | Every Model Tested (2026)
16 Best Robotic Pool Cleaners of 2026 - Reviewed

en.commentary: The Dolphin Premier holds my number one spot, and this week's head-to-head testing only strengthens the case. Its commercial-grade motors, Multi-Media filtration, and proven long-term reliability are exactly what you want in a machine you will run weekly for years. The big debate this season is corded versus cordless, and the data is clear. The Beatbot AquaSense 2 Ultra is the most capable battery robot, with AI mapping, surface skimming, and the longest runtime in its lineup, but at around 3,000 dollars it could not keep up with corded Dolphins at a fraction of the price in side-by-side tests. The cordless trade-offs are real: shorter run times, weaker suction, and constant recharging instead of a simple weekly timer. On fine debris, Dolphin's NanoFiltration captured noticeably finer particles than anything Beatbot offered. I keep the AquaSense 2 Ultra at number two because its convenience and navigation are genuinely class-leading, and for owners who hate cords it is the best of that breed. But for pure cleaning and value, corded still wins, which is why the Dolphin Nautilus CC Plus stays third as the smart-money pick. My guidance is steady. If you want the best clean and the longest service life, buy the Dolphin Premier and run it on a timer. If a cord around your pool genuinely bothers you and budget is no object, the Beatbot Ultra is the cordless to get. For most pool owners, though, the Nautilus CC Plus delivers the Dolphin cleaning experience at a price that makes sense.

highlights.title: Corded still wins on cleaning
highlights.body: In side-by-side tests, corded Dolphins out-cleaned the 3,000 dollar Beatbot Ultra at a fraction of the price.

highlights.title: NanoFiltration captures finer debris
highlights.body: Dolphin's filtration grabbed noticeably finer particles than any Beatbot system in this round of testing.

highlights.title: Cordless convenience leads, with trade-offs
highlights.body: The AquaSense 2 Ultra brings AI mapping and skimming but accepts shorter runtime, weaker suction, and frequent recharging.

highlights.title: Nautilus CC Plus is the smart money
highlights.body: It delivers the core Dolphin clean at a far friendlier price, my pick for most pool owners.

zh-tw.commentary: Dolphin Premier 這週守住第一，最新的對打實測只是讓它更穩。商用等級馬達、Multi-Media 多重濾網,加上多年驗證的可靠度,正是你要一台每週跑、用好幾年的機器該有的條件。這季最大的爭論是有線對無線,數據講得很清楚。Beatbot AquaSense 2 Ultra 是目前最強的電池機種,有 AI 建圖、水面清潔,續航也是自家最長,可是要價約台幣九萬,在並排測試裡卻打不過價格只有它一小部分的有線 Dolphin。無線的代價是真的,續航較短、吸力較弱,還要不停回充,沒辦法像有線那樣設個每週定時就好。碰到細小髒污,Dolphin 的 NanoFiltration 抓到的顆粒明顯比 Beatbot 任何一款都細。我還是把 AquaSense 2 Ultra 放第二,因為它的便利性跟導航確實是同級最強,討厭拖線的人,它就是無線陣營的最佳解。但講純清潔跟 CP 值,有線還是贏,所以 Dolphin Nautilus CC Plus 守住第三,是精打細算族的聰明選擇。我的建議很穩。想要最乾淨、用最久,就買 Dolphin Premier,設定時器讓它自己跑。真的很受不了泳池邊那條線、又不在乎預算,Beatbot Ultra 就是該入手的無線機。但對多數泳池主人來說,Nautilus CC Plus 用合理價格給你 Dolphin 的清潔體驗。

highlights.title: 純清潔有線還是贏
highlights.body: 並排實測裡，有線 Dolphin 用一小部分的價格，清潔表現勝過台幣九萬的 Beatbot Ultra。

highlights.title: NanoFiltration 抓得更細
highlights.body: 這輪測試中，Dolphin 濾網抓到的顆粒明顯比任何 Beatbot 系統都細。

highlights.title: 無線便利領先但有取捨
highlights.body: AquaSense 2 Ultra 有 AI 建圖跟水面清潔，代價是續航較短、吸力較弱、要常回充。

highlights.title: Nautilus CC Plus 是聰明選擇
highlights.body: 用更親民的價格給你 Dolphin 的核心清潔力，是我推給多數泳池主人的款。

references.title: Beatbot AquaSense X Review: The AstroRinse Station Is a Breakthrough
The Best Robotic Pool Cleaners for 2026, Tested and Reviewed

en.commentary:
Pool season is here, and with a hot summer forecast across most of the country, the pool is about to get a lot of use. That makes now the moment to lock in a robotic cleaner so you spend the season swimming, not skimming. The Dolphin Premier holds our top spot, and the reasoning is durability and proven results. After 32-plus head-to-head tests, independent reviewers and USA Today both name the Premier the best robotic pool cleaner for 2026. Its triple commercial-grade motors, swappable filtration media, and reliable navigation mean it cleans floor, walls, and waterline without drama, season after season. For an in-ground pool owner who wants one cleaner that simply works for years, this is the safe and smart buy.

The Beatbot AquaSense 2 Ultra at rank 2 is the AI-forward flagship for owners who want the cutting edge. Beatbot's newer AquaSense X, a CES 2026 Innovation Award honoree, raises the bar even further with its AstroRinse station, the first fully automatic filter-cleaning system that rinses the filter, empties the debris tank, and recharges the robot in about three minutes. That technology trajectory is exactly why Beatbot keeps its premium position in our rankings.

The Dolphin Nautilus CC Plus WiFi at rank 3 stays the value champion, delivering CleverClean smart scanning and dual scrubbing brushes at a price that makes robotic cleaning accessible. The Aiper Scuba S1 at rank 4 leads the cordless category for above-ground and smaller pools, and the Beatbot AquaSense 2 Pro at rank 5 rounds out the list with strong surface skimming. Heading into the heart of pool season, the Dolphin Premier remains the cleaner I trust to handle a full summer of daily swimming.

highlights.title: Dolphin Premier Is the Proven Season-Long Workhorse
highlights.body: Named best robotic pool cleaner for 2026 by USA Today and ranked first after 32-plus head-to-head tests, the Premier pairs triple commercial-grade motors with swappable filtration and reliable navigation. For an in-ground pool you swim all summer, it is the durable, no-drama choice.

highlights.title: Beatbot AquaSense X Brings Hands-Free Maintenance
highlights.body: The CES 2026 Innovation Award honoree introduced the AstroRinse station, the first fully automatic filter-cleaning system, which rinses the filter, empties the bin, and recharges the robot in about three minutes. That trajectory keeps Beatbot's flagship at the premium tier of our rankings.

highlights.title: Pool Season Plus a Hot Summer Means Buy Now
highlights.body: With a hot summer forecast nearly nationwide, pools will see heavy use this year. Locking in a robotic cleaner now means you spend the season swimming instead of skimming, and the Dolphin Nautilus CC Plus makes that affordable for value buyers.

zh-tw.commentary:
泳池季到了，加上今年全國大多地區都預測是酷暑，泳池接下來會被用得很兇。這代表現在就是把泳池機器人定下來的時機，讓你整季都在游泳，而不是在撈葉子。Dolphin Premier 穩坐我們的榜首，理由是耐用度和經過驗證的成績。經過 32 次以上的對決測試，獨立評測者和 USA Today 都把 Premier 評為 2026 年最佳泳池機器人。它三顆商業級馬達、可更換的濾材、加上可靠的導航，意味著它能年復一年把池底、池壁、水線都清乾淨，不出狀況。對地下式泳池的屋主來說，想要一台用很多年都好用的清潔機，這就是又安全又聰明的選擇。

第二名的 Beatbot AquaSense 2 Ultra，是給想要最前沿科技的人準備的 AI 旗艦。Beatbot 更新的 AquaSense X 拿下 CES 2026 創新獎，它的 AstroRinse 基座把標準又拉高，這是第一個全自動濾網清潔系統，大約三分鐘就能沖洗濾網、倒掉集塵、再幫機器人充電。正是這個技術走向，讓 Beatbot 持續穩居我們榜單的高階位置。

第三名的 Dolphin Nautilus CC Plus WiFi 依然是性價比冠軍，CleverClean 智慧掃描加上雙刷頭，用親民價格讓泳池機器人變得人人買得起。第四名的 Aiper Scuba S1 主打無線，適合地上式和小型泳池，第五名的 Beatbot AquaSense 2 Pro 靠出色的水面撈污補上榜尾。泳池季正熱，Dolphin Premier 仍然是我信得過、能撐過一整個夏天天天游泳的那台。

highlights.title: Dolphin Premier 是驗證過的整季主力
highlights.body: 被 USA Today 評為 2026 年最佳泳池機器人，32 次以上對決測試排名第一。三顆商業級馬達搭配可換濾材和可靠導航，地下式泳池整個夏天天天游，它就是耐用又不出包的選擇。

highlights.title: Beatbot AquaSense X 帶來免手動保養
highlights.body: 這台 CES 2026 創新獎得主推出 AstroRinse 基座，是第一個全自動濾網清潔系統，約三分鐘就能沖洗濾網、倒集塵、再充電。這個技術走向讓 Beatbot 旗艦穩居榜單高階位置。

highlights.title: 泳池季加酷暑就是現在入手的理由
highlights.body: 今年全國大多地區預測酷暑，泳池使用率會很高。現在把泳池機器人定下來，整季都在游泳而不是撈污，Dolphin Nautilus CC Plus 更讓預算型買家負擔得起。
